---
title: "15_bTF_regression_primary"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  freeze: auto
---

# Setup

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(glmnet)
library(here)
library(randomForest)
library(caret)

data <- readxl::read_xlsx(here('data', 'processed', 'PCAWG_primary.xlsx'))
clean_data <- data %>% 
  drop_na()
summary(clean_data)
```
